stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Bank of Japan to keep key rate at next week's policy meeting: sources
Japanese Yen remains pinned near 40-year low as Fed-BoJ rate gap keeps carry trade active
Korean Investors Retreat From Japan Stocks as Nikkei, Yen Slump
Japan to take "decisive" action when needed as yen extends slide toward 164 line
The Japanese yen is awaiting a potential move following statements from the Japanese finance minister
British Pound steadies against Japanese Yen following outperformance in UK Retail Sales
Japan stocks lower at close of trade; Nikkei 225 down 2.79%

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 니케이 225 지수가 2.79% 하락하며 약세를 보였으며, 한국 투자자들의 이탈 움직임도 포착되었습니다. 엔화는 미국과 일본의 금리 격차 확대 및 다음 주 일본은행의 정책금리 동결 전망으로 40년 만의 최저치 부근에서 약세를 지속하고 있습니다. 일본 당국은 엔화의 164엔대 하락에 대해 "단호한 조치"를 취할 준비가 되어 있다고 경고하며 향후 시장의 주요 변수로 작용할 전망입니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese stocks experienced a significant downturn today, with the Nikkei 225 closing nearly 2.8% lower amidst a broader retreat by some investors. A key theme is the persistent weakness of the Japanese Yen, which remains near a 40-year low due to the substantial Fed-BoJ interest rate gap and expectations that the Bank of Japan will maintain its current policy next week. Japanese authorities are closely monitoring the yen's slide and have reiterated their readiness to take "decisive action" if necessary to stem its depreciation, posing a potential catalyst for the currency.
